title: Data Classification Engine — Auto-Classification & PII Regex Pipeline
description: data_classification.py classifies assets with classification levels and data categories backed by SQLite. test_data_classification.py validates levels, categories, and the FastAPI endpoints. Gap: classification is manual — an asset is classified by a human. There is no automated PII detection that scans data stores and suggests a classification level.
missing: Auto-classification engine: scan text content from uploaded files/DB records using regex patterns for PII (SSN, credit card, email, phone) and suggest a classification level automatically
Data store integration: when data_discovery_engine identifies a new datastore, auto-trigger data_classification to classify its schema and sample records
Classification label enforcement: add data_classification_label field to all major engine DB schemas so every record carries its classification level
